phase_name: v2.1.8 released — Custom Client ID fallback + community support

completed_tasks.name: Clean-install reproduction of Custom Client ID 403 bug
Token routing code analysis — identified missing fallback in _doFlavouredRequest
Fix: bundled fallback on no_token for flavor=own non-me/* paths
Reproduction verified — fake Client ID triggers Keymaster 404, fallback works
Keymaster whitelist research — confirmed grandfathered IDs only
i18n updates (11 languages): DESC, DEGRADED_MODE, SETUP_TITLE, SETUP_DESC
README + TROUBLESHOOTING updated with Keymaster restriction info
v2.1.8 released — tag, CI, repo.xml SHA updated

decisions.decision: Bundled fallback at no_token level, not just HTTP 403/410
decisions.rationale: Keymaster failure is a different code path than API 403 — both need fallback to bundled for non-me/* paths

decisions.decision: Custom Client ID docs: 'older apps only' instead of 'recommended'
decisions.rationale: Keymaster whitelist means new Developer Apps will always fail. No point encouraging users to create them.

decisions.decision: Dev environment restored to symlink after clean-install testing
decisions.rationale: Clean install via Plugin Manager was for reproduction only, not permanent

next_action: Warten auf Rückmeldungen: #91 (woorszt v2.1.8 Bestätigung), #85 (urknall Playlists), #60 (warminskimarcin Cache-Clear), #50 (JesseHoekema RPi3 --check). Backlog: #82 Artist Radio, #55 Context Menu LMS, #32 Library Integration, #7 Search Pagination.
context_notes: v2.1.8 shipped. Alle Custom-Client-ID-Issues beantwortet. Dev-Umgebung zurück auf Symlink mit eigener Client ID (56bcbd90...). Forum ruhig (119 Posts, kein Triage-Bedarf). Upstream: librespot #1724 (IPv6, gevendort), SqueezeDSP #19 (wartet auf Foxenfurter).
